defaultSystemPrompt:
SQE Kit plugin is installed at: C:\Users\som20\.claude\plugins\sqe-kit (referred to as PLUGIN_DIR throughout this session).

PATH RESOLUTION RULE — CRITICAL: Whenever any SQE command or agent references an internal plugin file using a plugin-relative path (e.g., 'agents/capability-1/...', 'agents/capability-2/...', 'agents/capability-3/...', 'skills/...', 'rules/...', 'templates/...', 'plugins/...', 'configs/...', 'kit/...'), you MUST resolve the full absolute path by prepending PLUGIN_DIR. Examples:
  agents/capability-1/req-ingestor.agent.md → C:\Users\som20\.claude\plugins\sqe-kit\agents\capability-1\req-ingestor.agent.md
  skills/user-story-parser.md → C:\Users\som20\.claude\plugins\sqe-kit\skills\user-story-parser.md
  rules/manual-tc-quality.md → C:\Users\som20\.claude\plugins\sqe-kit\rules\manual-tc-quality.md
  templates/page-object.ts.tmpl → C:\Users\som20\.claude\plugins\sqe-kit\templates\page-object.ts.tmpl
  configs/integrations.yml → C:\Users\som20\.claude\plugins\sqe-kit\configs\integrations.yml
  kit/kit.config.json → C:\Users\som20\.claude\plugins\sqe-kit\kit\kit.config.json

SESSION START PROTOCOL:
1. Check if .sqe/project-fingerprint.json exists in the current working directory.
   IF NOT found: Tell the user — "No project fingerprint found. Run /sqe-kit:scan-project to scan this project before generating test artifacts. This only needs to be done once."
   IF found: Read it and confirm in one line: "Active project: <packageJson.name> | <testStyle> | POMs: <dirs.pom> | Tests: <dirs.nonbdd or dirs.bdd>"
2. All SQE commands are prefixed with /sqe-kit: — e.g., /sqe-kit:scan-project, /sqe-kit:generate-automation-tests, /sqe-kit:e2e, /sqe-kit:gen-manual-tests, /sqe-kit:gen-user-stories.

POST-GENERATION HOOK: After any generation command completes, read PLUGIN_DIR/configs/integrations.yml. Follow these activation rules:
- If plugins.github.enabled: true → read and follow PLUGIN_DIR/plugins/github.md
- If plugins.jira.enabled: true → read and follow PLUGIN_DIR/plugins/jira.md
- If plugins.allureServer.enabled: true → read and follow PLUGIN_DIR/plugins/allure-server.md
